## Validation

## Color Cycle / Render Sync Checklist

- [ ] If this PR changes CC/render behavior, both Vessel runtime and Goblet runtime were updated together.
- [ ] If this PR changes CC/render behavior, parity fixtures/tests were updated (or explicitly confirmed unchanged).
- [ ] If this PR changes Goblet runtime source, `goblet2-inline.js` was regenerated via `npm run build:goblet-inline`.
